problems.title: Materialization invalid due to field identity split
problems.detail: The older field-level snapshot was anchored to field:17 before a governed split created child field identities. It cannot be reused for a high-consequence filing without recomputing on the child scope set.
problems.suggestedRemediation: Recompute the compliance materialization on field:17-north and field:17-south, then assemble a successor filing path.

reasonSummary: The current-state basis became invalid for filing because a governed field split changed the anchor identity after the original snapshot was generated.
